top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan’s Ward Says Oil Could Become a Huge Tailwind for Stocks - Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan’s Ward Says Oil Could Become a Huge Tailwind for Stocks  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia Kicks Off Its First Corporate Bond Offering in Five Years
top_signals.summary: Nvidia Corp. is seeking to sell high-grade debt for the first time in about five years, extending a relentless wave of borrowing for companies spearheading the artificial intelligence boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX shares set for second day of gains after blockbuster debut
top_signals.summary: Stock in Elon Musk’s AI, satellite and rocket group climbs more than 5% in pre-market trading on Monday
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
Fox to acquire streaming platform Roku for $22bn
top_signals.summary: Combined company will become third-largest in US television by share of viewing as media landscape shifts dramatically

top_signals.title: Webinar: How behavioral AI stops phishing and account takeovers
top_signals.summary: Modern phishing, BEC, and account takeover attacks increasingly bypass traditional email defenses and create operational strain for security teams. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help automate detection, investigation, and remediation to reduce alert fatigue and accelerate response times. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
